narrative:
Lake County has 161,399 registered voters, with 55.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 23.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 21.6%, a narrow Republican lean of 1.6 percentage points. Baby Boomers are the largest generational cohort at 31.2% of registrants. Registration is trending bluer in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean +2.5% D−R vs -6.3% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
